allow_private_urls — SSRF Bypass for Docker Networks
Rationale: allow_private_urls bypasses docling_core SSRF check for trusted Docker networks (MinIO on same network)
Rationale: embedding_api_key is separate from llm_api_key to allow different provider credentials per pipeline request
Rationale: parsers and extractors registered with try/except ImportError so package installs without optional extras
Rationale: incremental mode uses SHA-256 of file bytes to skip unchanged sources and avoid re-embedding
Rationale: contextual_injection prepends LLM-generated situational context to each chunk to improve RAG retrieval fidelity
Rationale: _resolve_source pre-fetches private URLs as DocumentStream to bypass docling_core SSRF IP block while keeping security default-off
